title: Dominant Parties Impose Cartelized Ballot-Access Barriers
description: State election authorities, under pressure from dominant parties, impose extraordinary signature and filing barriers targeted at new parties and independent entrants. The scenario tests whether Article I's party-qualification rules and anti-cartel protections give courts a direct basis to void the barriers.

events.actor: State election authorities and dominant parties

details.barrier: extraordinary signature and filing barriers targeted at new parties and independent entrants
